sections.paragraph:
Original: נר

Transliteration: nêr

Phonetic: nare

BDB Definition:

Ner = "lamp"
  1. son of Jehiel, father of Kish, and grandfather of king Saul
  2. father of Abner, the uncle of Saul
    1. perhaps the same as 1

Origin: the same as H5216

TWOT entry: 1333a

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
